items.title: Benchmark caching options
items.body:
## Context

Run representative formatter benchmarks and write down whether caching is warranted.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Benchmarks cover repeated formatter calls
- [ ] Findings are documented in a short note
- [ ] Recommendation states whether caching should be added or skipped
items.complexity_rationale: This is a single-scope discovery task focused on benchmarks and written findings rather than a broad code change.
